title: EXTEKK Luxe v3 — hacker × glassmorphism × 3D WebGL overkill (4-agent)

spec.label: architect
spec.prompt:
You are designing EXTEKK Luxe v3 — a million-dollar landing page that fuses HACKER COUTURE × GLASSMORPHISM × 3D WebGL into one site that feels alive. Previous v2 was tactile brutalism and shipped clean — now we go OVERKILL: living, breathing, hacker-luxe, Awwwards Site of the Year tier. The brief: Discord security bot landing. Make it feel like the operations console of an elite cyber-defense unit, rendered as if Apple designed Mr. Robot's UI. ## Pattern selections (REQUIRED — from docs/LUXE-DESIGN-PLAYBOOK.md) - Visual style: FUSION — style.neon_cyber_minimal (hacker base) ⊕ style.glassmorphism_saas_v2 (refined glass surfaces) ⊕ style.dark_first_oled (true #000000) ⊕ style.aurora_liquid_glass (gradient mesh depth behind glass) - Layout: layout.asymmetric_hero (default) + layout.bento_dashboard_v1 (arsenal section) + scrollytelling_narrative (watch-it-work) - Motion: motion.3d_hero_lightweight (Three.js Matrix rain — REQUIRED) + motion.kinetic_typography (variable-font scroll modulation) + motion.micro_interactions_pack - Brand reference: Framer (docs/design/brands/framer/brand-style.md) for dark canvas + GT Walsheim-style negative tracking + spotlight gradient cards. Cursor (docs/design/brands/cursor/brand-style.md) for JetBrains Mono code surfaces. ## Required design references (cite ONE specific visual move from each in your ## Concept) 1. linear.app — refined dark depth, gradient blobs, scroll-driven sections 2. framer.com — pure black canvas with oversized vibrant gradient spotlight cards (magenta/violet/orange) that act as living atmosphere 3. tailscale.com — hacker-credibility without toxic neon 4. oxide.computer — tactile brutalism, monospace-as-display 5. awwwards.com Site of the Day — kinetic 3D hero, custom cursor, glitch-on-hover, scan-line overlays ## Product facts - EXTEKK is a Discord security & server-insurance bot. - Restores nuked servers in 1 second (channels, categories, roles, vouches). - AI engine for scam-prevention + auto-moderation. - Features: OAuth2 Member & Server Restore, 1-click Aesthetic Server Builder & Lockdown, Pro Ticket System, EXTEKK Sentinel (auto-mod 24/7, deletes phishing, mutes spammers), Universal Vouch Vault & Reputation, Global Scammer Blacklist. - Stats: 23,373 servers protected, 11,600 premium customers, 24/7 active support, 5★. - Marketing-only landing. Primary CTA: 'Add to Discord'. Output a tight Markdown spec with EXACTLY these section headings, in order: ## Concept 2 sentences with the brand promise. Then 5 sentences explicitly naming a visual move borrowed from each of the five reference points above (one sentence per reference). ## Tone 3 adjectives. Cyber-elite, security-grade, no fluff. ## Information architecture 10-12 sections in order, each with one-line purpose. MUST include: kinetic-marquee threat feed (real CVE IDs scrolling), live-ops dashboard hero, scrollytelling 'attack timeline', spotlight gradient cards in bento, immersive terminal demo with REAL typing. ## Hero copy Headline (max 8 words, must read like a thriller film tagline AND fit on 1 line on desktop). Sub-headline (one sentence ≤ 18 words). Primary CTA label (≤ 3 words). Secondary CTA label (≤ 3 words). Live-ops status pill (e.g., 'SENTINEL ONLINE · 23,373 SERVERS WATCHED · 99.99% UPTIME'). Glitch-on-hover phrase that briefly RGB-shifts on the headline's accent word. ## Kinetic threat-feed marquee 8-12 short status fragments to scroll horizontally (e.g., 'CVE-2026-1129 · NEUTRALIZED · 0.41s', 'phishing.attempt blocked from /raid-server-7', 'mass-mention spam · muted · 12 users', 'OAuth restore complete · 14 channels rebuilt'). Real CVE-style IDs. Mix EN + light cyber-jargon. ## Watch-it-work — scrollytelling narrative (5 scroll states) For each: state name + one-line description + timing pill. Heist-movie cadence: T-0.000s ATTACK INBOUND T-0.120s SENTINEL ENGAGED T-0.420s LOCKDOWN ACTIVE T-0.780s OAUTH RESTORE T-1.000s SERVER REBUILT The right side has a sticky 3D visual that morphs as user scrolls — describe it. ## Live numbers — 4 spotlight cards (Framer-style) Label + final number + supporting unit. Each card has its own gradient atmosphere (violet / magenta / orange / mint). Numbers count up from 0 on viewport entry (1.2s cubic-bezier). ## Bento arsenal — 6 cards (BENTO LAYOUT) For each: 1-2 word ALL CAPS title, ≤ 14-word description, icon keyword, atmosphere note (which card glows what color). Layout: ONE 2x2 hero cell (oauth restore — biggest, with mini live demo embedded), TWO 2x1 medium cells (sentinel + builder), THREE 1x1 small cells (tickets + vouch vault + blacklist). NEVER six equal cells. ## Terminal demo — copy for code blocks Three side-by-side macOS-chrome terminals. Each: $ shell prompt + 4-6 output lines with ISO timestamps + ✓ ticks + durations + colored output (status pills inside the terminal). Real EXTEKK CLI: `extekk restore --target=#general`, `extekk lockdown --severity=critical`, `extekk vouches sync --vault=universal`. Hero terminal MUST do real letter-by-letter typing animation with a blinking cursor — call it out. ## Testimonials — 3 fixed quotes Not a marquee. For each: 2-sentence quote in Discord-mod / community-leader tone, persona (`@handle`, role, server-count), green-check 'verified · server protected since YYYY-MM' tag. ## Pricing — 2 tiers Free (everything that exists today) and Pro ($19/mo, 14-day free trial). Each: header, 6 feature bullets (✓ or ✗), single CTA label. Pro has 'most popular' status pill AND a slow accent-glow border that drifts. ## FAQ — 5 questions Real concerns, ≤ 30-word answers each, confident not defensive. Use
. ## Final CTA One-line invitation + button label + secondary 'docs' link. ≤ 14 words total. Tagline reads like a heist-movie ending. ## Footer 5 nav links, social (Discord, GitHub, Twitter), legal, single ALL-CAPS hacker tagline above copyright (e.g., 'BUILT FOR THE 0.01% OF SERVERS THAT CAN'T AFFORD TO DIE'). ## Color palette — STRICT - Background: pure obsidian (#000000 — NEVER #0f1115) - Surface lifts: #0a0a0a (raised), #141414 (panels), #1c1c1c (featured) - Foreground hierarchy: white at 100% / 70% / 45% / 20% — NEVER colored gray - Primary acid accent: pick ONE of [#00ff94 electric mint, #00ffe0 cyan, #caff00 chartreuse]. Justify in one sentence. - Glass tints: rgba(255,255,255,0.04) on dark + 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.08) hairline - Spotlight gradients (Framer-tier — for the 4 live-numbers cards + 1 bento hero): violet #6a4cf5, magenta #d44df0, orange #ff7a3d, the chosen acid. These appear ONLY on dedicated spotlight cards, never as section grounds. - Alert red (#ff3b5c) — only for ATTACK DETECTED state. - Custom cursor: small accent dot replacing the arrow, expands on link hover. - DO NOT use a pastel gradient for the hero. DO NOT use three brand colors. DO NOT use purple-blue-everywhere. ## Type stack — STRICT Two Google Fonts. Pair an editorial display + monospace. NEVER pair two sans-serifs. Variable fonts ONLY (must expose wght and wdth axes for scroll-driven modulation): - Display: pick from [Geist (variable), Fraunces (variable, neo-serif), Instrument Serif, Anton, IBM Plex Sans (variable)]. Justify why. - Mono: pick from [JetBrains Mono (variable), Geist Mono (variable), IBM Plex Mono]. Justify why. Body is the display family at 17px / 400 weight. Letter-spacing on display: clamp(-5.5px @ 160px → -0.04em @ 72px) — Framer-tier negative tracking. ## 3D / WebGL hero requirements — REQUIRED, NOT OPTIONAL - Hero MUST contain a Three.js or pure-WebGL canvas. - Effect: Matrix rain — falling streams of monochrome characters (binary 0/1 + hex addresses + EXTEKK CLI fragments like 'restore', 'lockdown', '✓') in 3D perspective, depth fog, slight camera tilt on cursor parallax. - Polygon budget: < 50k tris. - Lazy-load three.module.js — do NOT bundle. - Static fallback for browsers without WebGL. - Pause when document.visibilityState === 'hidden'. - prefers-reduced-motion: use a CSS-only static glyph grid as fallback. Be opinionated. No hedging. Every choice must feel inevitable. The result must read as 'someone spent $250k on this site' — not as 'AI generated dark landing page'.

spec.label: designer
spec.prompt:
OUTPUT MODE: TEXT ONLY. No tools. No write_file. No sub-agent delegation. Respond with raw text only.

You are the lead designer for EXTEKK Luxe v3 — hacker × glassmorphism × 3D WebGL overkill. The architect's spec defines IA + copy + colors + fonts + 3D requirements. Your job: turn it into a 2026 Awwwards-Site-of-the-Year visual system.

## STRICT DO-NOTs (failing any voids the spec)
- DO NOT use border-radius on cards/sections > 16px. Glass cards: 12-16px max. Spotlight gradient cards: 20px. NEVER 24/32/40px.
- DO NOT use the toxic-2021 glassmorphism (white frost + soft pastel). Use the 2026 v2: very dark base + 4-8% white tint + 1px hairline + backdrop-filter blur(28px) saturate(180%).
- DO NOT use box-shadow for primary depth. Depth = surface lift (canvas → surface-1 → surface-2) + 1px borders + glass + animated gradient blobs. ONE shadow allowed: a tight rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 0 1px 0 inset on glass top edge to fake light.
- DO NOT use a pastel hero gradient.
- DO NOT use a 3-equal-column 'features' grid (architect's bento layout is REQUIRED).
- DO NOT use a 'trusted by' logo wall under the hero.
- DO NOT use stock photography.
- DO NOT use placeholder lorem ipsum.

Output ONLY these sections:

## Logo
A self-contained <svg viewBox='0 0 360 80'>. The wordmark 'EXTEKK' in display sans (negative tracking like Framer's GT Walsheim) + an angular geometric shield/cursor mark. White wordmark on transparent background. Add a thin animated SVG path that traces the shield outline on first paint (use <animate> attributes — declarative). NO emoji, NO smiley faces. Output the full SVG ready to paste.

## Color tokens
A CSS :root block with full token system:
  --bg-0: #000000  /* pure obsidian */
  --bg-1: #0a0a0a  /* raised */
  --bg-2: #141414  /* panels */
  --bg-3: #1c1c1c  /* featured */
  --fg-0: #ffffff
  --fg-1: rgba(255,255,255,0.70)
  --fg-2: rgba(255,255,255,0.45)
  --fg-3: rgba(255,255,255,0.20)
  --accent: <architect's acid>
  --accent-glow: <accent at 60% alpha>
  --accent-soft: <accent at 12% alpha>
  --alert: #ff3b5c
  --grad-violet: #6a4cf5
  --grad-magenta: #d44df0
  --grad-orange: #ff7a3d
  --glass: rgba(255,255,255,0.04)
  --glass-strong: rgba(255,255,255,0.08)
  --hairline: rgba(255,255,255,0.10)
  --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08)
  --grid: rgba(<accent rgb>, 0.04)
  --r-0: 0px
  --r-glass: 14px
  --r-spot: 20px
  --r-pill: 999px
  --s-1 4 → --s-7 96px clean ladder
  --ease-in: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)
  --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1)
  --ease-mech: linear  /* typing only */

## Typography
@import line for the architect-picked Google Fonts. Base scale: h1, h2, h3, body, mono, micro with concrete sizes + line-heights + letter-spacing. h1 must be `clamp(72px, 11vw, 160px)`, line-height 0.92, letter-spacing -0.04em (Framer-tier negative tracking). Variable-font axis declarations for both display + mono.

## Layout sketches — five states (high-fidelity)
For each: STATE NAME + 2-sentence purpose + a self-contained inline <svg viewBox='0 0 1280 720'>. Real labels, real numbers, real button copy from architect's hero copy. SVGs ≥ 1280×720, no placeholder text:
  1. ASYMMETRIC HERO (full viewport): Three.js Matrix rain canvas in BACKGROUND (depth blur), 2 animated gradient blobs floating, edge-to-edge headline LEFT at clamp(72px, 11vw, 160px), glassmorphic terminal panel RIGHT (backdrop-filter blur 28px on top of the 3D canvas — THIS is the hacker × glass fusion). Live-ops status pill at top. Custom cursor dot. Glitch-on-hover indicator on accent word.
  2. KINETIC THREAT-FEED MARQUEE: full-width horizontal scroll bar with mono CVE IDs, status fragments, severity dots. Continuous loop. Subtle gradient fade on edges.
  3. SCROLLYTELLING WATCH-IT-WORK (asymmetric layout): left side has 5 scroll states stacked vertically with timing pills, right side has STICKY 3D visual that morphs (shield rotates → lockdown chains snap → server skeleton rebuilds). Progress dots on far right edge.
  4. BENTO ARSENAL (4-col × 2-row): ONE 2x2 hero cell (oauth restore, with mini live-demo embed) + TWO 2x1 (sentinel + builder, each gets a Framer-tier spotlight gradient — violet + magenta) + THREE 1x1 (tickets + vouch vault + blacklist). 1px solid borders, 12-14px radius on glass cards, 20px on spotlight gradient cards. Cursor-following radial-gradient glow per cell.
  5. LIVE NUMBERS SPOTLIGHT ROW (Framer-tier): 4 cards with vibrant gradient grounds (violet / magenta / orange / accent-mint). Numbers in display font at 96-120px. Sit inside otherwise monochrome glass band — these ARE the atmosphere device.

## Motion
10 specific animations with cubic-bezier curves and durations. ALL must use cubic-bezier — never `ease`:
  - hero terminal letter-by-letter typing (60ms per char, linear — feels mechanical, blinking caret 530ms steps)
  - scroll-driven variable-font weight modulation on hero h1 (wght 700 → 300 as scrollY 0 → window.innerHeight)
  - 3D Matrix rain (Three.js — perspective 35°, columns drift -y, fog at z=-800, cursor parallax tilts camera ±3° on mousemove)
  - blob mesh drift (32s + 41s ease-in-out infinite, 2 pseudo-elements, filter: blur 140px, mix-blend-mode: screen, opacity 0.4)
  - SVG noise translation (600ms ease-in-out infinite, 5px translate, opacity 0.06, mix-blend-mode: overlay)
  - kinetic threat-feed marquee (60s linear infinite, gradient fade-mask 80px each edge)
  - 3D card hover tilt (perspective: 1000px; transform: rotateX(calc(var(--ty) * 8deg)) rotateY(calc(var(--tx) * 8deg)) — cursor parallax)
  - cursor-following radial-gradient glow on bento cells (transform via --mx, --my custom props on mousemove, 220ms cubic-bezier)
  - number counter roll-up on live-numbers (1200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), IntersectionObserver triggered)
  - magnetic CTA (primary CTA pulled toward cursor 8px when mouse within 80px, 280ms cubic-bezier)
  - glitch-on-hover on hero accent word (RGB shift +2px / -2px on red+cyan channels, 80ms 4 cycles, then snap)
  - custom cursor (12px accent dot, mix-blend-mode: difference, expands to 32px on link hover with 180ms ease-out)
  - scrollytelling sticky-visual morph (3D shield → lockdown chains → server skeleton, IntersectionObserver state machine, 4 viewport states)
  - scan-line overlay on hero terminal (repeating-linear-gradient 0.5deg / 4px / rgba(0,255,148,0.04), animated translateY 4px in 1.5s linear infinite — CRT vibe)

## Mood
3 sentences. Cyber-elite. Premium-grade glass over a Matrix-rain undercurrent. Refined, not toxic.

## Spec
{{architect}}

spec.label: engineer
spec.prompt:
Implement EXTEKK Luxe v3 as a single static site — pure HTML + CSS + JS, no framework, no build step. Drops into /var/www/extekk-luxe/.

For every file, output a fenced code block whose FIRST line is a comment with the file path:
  - HTML: `<!-- index.html -->`
  - CSS: `/* style.css */`
  - JS: `// script.js`
  - SVG: `<!-- logo.svg -->`
  - JSON: `<!-- manifest.json -->` then the JSON

Files, in order: index.html, style.css, script.js, three-matrix.js, logo.svg, manifest.json, robots.txt.

Use VERBATIM from upstream:
  - Color tokens from {{designer}} — paste the :root block as the FIRST thing in style.css
  - Logo SVG from {{designer}} verbatim into logo.svg
  - Typography pairing + @import from {{designer}}
  - All on-screen copy from {{architect}} verbatim

---

## NON-NEGOTIABLE 16-POINT CHECKLIST — ALL REQUIRED OR DO NOT SUBMIT

The output MUST satisfy ALL sixteen. Self-audit before emitting any file. If you cannot honestly tick all 16, state which are missing at the bottom and we will reject.

[1]  Hero headline ≥ clamp(72px, 11vw, 160px) font-size, line-height 0.92, letter-spacing -0.04em. Edge-to-edge.
[2]  Variable-font axis modulation (wght and/or wdth) on hero h1 driven by scroll progress (JS scroll listener — wght 700→300 as scrollY 0→innerHeight).
[3]  3D WebGL Matrix rain in hero — load Three.js from CDN as ES module, lazy-load via dynamic import(), render to <canvas id='matrix-canvas'> behind hero text. Falling glyphs (binary + hex + EXTEKK fragments), perspective camera, fog, cursor-parallax tilt ±3°. Pause on document.visibilityState === 'hidden'. Static SVG glyph grid fallback for prefers-reduced-motion + no-WebGL.
[4]  Glassmorphism 2026-v2 surfaces: nav + hero terminal + feature cards + pricing cards. backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(180%); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 14px (cards) or 0 (nav bottom-bar). NO white frost; the dark base shows through.
[5]  At least 2 animated gradient blobs in the hero. Position: absolute pseudo-elements OR dedicated divs. border-radius: 50%, filter: blur(140px), mix-blend-mode: screen, opacity 0.4, slow drift via @keyframes 32s + 41s ease-in-out infinite (different durations so loop never visibly repeats).
[6]  Cursor-driven micro-interactions: (a) custom cursor (12px accent dot replacing arrow, mix-blend-mode: difference, expands to 32px on link/button hover); (b) cursor-parallax 3D card tilt on bento cells (perspective + rotateX/Y based on cursor position over card, 8° max); (c) radial-gradient glow following cursor on bento cells via --mx/--my CSS custom props.
[7]  Animated SVG noise/film-grain overlay (feTurbulence data URI). position: fixed, mix-blend-mode: overlay, opacity 0.06, animated translate via @keyframes 600ms ease-in-out infinite.
[8]  Bento arsenal section: 4-col × 2-row grid. ONE 2x2 hero cell (oauth restore — embed mini live demo: animated SVG of channels rebuilding) + TWO 2x1 medium (sentinel + builder, each with Framer-tier spotlight gradient: violet + magenta) + THREE 1x1 small. CSS Grid grid-template-areas. NEVER 6 equal cells.
[9]  Kinetic threat-feed marquee: full-width horizontal scroll with mono CVE IDs + status fragments. CSS animation 60s linear infinite, gradient fade-mask on edges. Two duplicate tracks for seamless loop.
[10] Scrollytelling watch-it-work: 5 scroll states on left, sticky 3D visual on right (CSS-only morphing — IntersectionObserver toggles states). Progress dots on far right edge.
[11] Live numbers spotlight row: 4 Framer-tier gradient cards (violet / magenta / orange / accent). Numbers count up from 0 on viewport entry (1200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), IntersectionObserver). Display font at 96-120px.
[12] Magnetic CTA on primary 'Add to Discord' button: pulled toward cursor 8px when within 80px, 280ms cubic-bezier transition.
[13] Glitch-on-hover on hero accent word: RGB shift on red+cyan channels (text-shadow with 2 offset duplicates, 80ms × 4 cycles, then snap). Use CSS @keyframes + :hover trigger.
[14] Scan-line overlay on hero terminal: repeating-linear-gradient at 0.5deg, 4px lines, accent-color at 4% opacity, animated translateY 4px / 1.5s linear infinite.
[15] All animations use cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for entrances, cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1) for exits. NEVER `ease`, `ease-in`, `ease-out`, `linear` (typing animation + marquee + scan-line are exceptions). Search your CSS before submitting.
[16] @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) disables ALL kinetic: typing, blob drift, noise, scroll-modulation, cursor effects, marquee, scrollytelling morph, magnetic CTA, glitch, scan-lines, AND replaces Three.js canvas with static SVG fallback.

## Anti-patterns (instant rejection — search before submitting)
- Glass cards with white backgrounds + soft pastel + rounded > 16px (= 2021–22 toxic glass).
- Drop shadows for card depth (besides ONE inset top-edge fake-light line).
- Border-radius > 16px on glass cards or > 20px on spotlight gradient cards.
- 3-equal-column features grid.
- 'Trusted by' logo wall under hero.
- Stock photography.
- Placeholder text.
- box-shadow with high blur for depth.
- Three.js bundled into main JS (must be lazy-loaded via dynamic import).

## Three.js Matrix rain (three-matrix.js) — REQUIRED IMPLEMENTATION
```js
// three-matrix.js — lazy-loaded ES module
import * as THREE from 'https://unpkg.com/three@0.160.0/build/three.module.js';

export function initMatrixRain(canvasEl) {
  const scene = new THREE.Scene();
  scene.fog = new THREE.Fog(0x000000, 200, 800);
  const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(35, innerWidth/innerHeight, 0.1, 1000);
  camera.position.set(0, 0, 400);
  const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ canvas: canvasEl, alpha: true, antialias: true });
  renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(devicePixelRatio, 2));
  renderer.setSize(innerWidth, innerHeight);
  // ... build columns of glyph sprites via Canvas2D textures, animate -y, recycle past viewport
  // ... cursor parallax: rotate camera ±3° on mousemove
  // ... pause on document.hidden
  return { stop, resize };
}
```
Develop the full implementation. Falling characters: binary 0/1 + hex 0xA-F + EXTEKK fragments ['restore', 'lockdown', '✓', 'sentinel', 'sync']. Color: var(--accent) at 70-100% intensity for head, fading to 0 at tail. ~100-150 columns.

## Sections to implement, in order:
  1. Sticky GLASSMORPHIC NAV. backdrop-filter blur 28px saturate 180%, background rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 1px bottom border at --hairline. Logo left, links centre (Features / Arsenal / Pricing / Docs / FAQ), 'Add to Discord' primary pill right, mobile burger.
  2. ASYMMETRIC HERO (full viewport): Three.js Matrix rain canvas BEHIND, 2 animated gradient blobs, headline LEFT (variable-font scroll modulation, glitch-on-hover on accent word), glassmorphic terminal panel RIGHT (with scan-line overlay, real letter-by-letter typing animation of `$ extekk restore --target=#general` → 6-line output with timestamps + ✓ ticks), live-ops status pill top, magnetic primary CTA. Custom cursor active site-wide.
  3. KINETIC THREAT-FEED MARQUEE: full-width horizontal scroll, 12 mono fragments, fade-mask edges.
  4. SCROLLYTELLING WATCH-IT-WORK: 5 scroll states left + sticky CSS-morphing 3D visual right + progress dots edge. ATTACK INBOUND state has --alert pulse.
  5. LIVE NUMBERS SPOTLIGHT ROW: 4 Framer-tier gradient cards. Counters animate from 0.
  6. BENTO ARSENAL: 6 cells in 4×2 grid. Hero cell (2x2) has embedded mini-demo SVG. Spotlight gradient on 2 medium cells. Cursor-tilt 3D + radial glow on every card.
  7. TERMINAL DEMO: 3 side-by-side macOS-chrome glassmorphic terminals with mono fonts, syntax-coloured prompts, ✓ ticks, real EXTEKK CLI commands.
  8. TESTIMONIALS: 3 fixed glassmorphic cards.
  9. PRICING: 2 glassmorphic cards. Pro card has slow accent-glow border (animated --conic-gradient 8s linear infinite OR 1px gradient border via mask).
 10. FAQ: 5 <details><summary> accordion items. Open one by default.
 11. FINAL CTA: huge headline at clamp(56px, 8vw, 112px) + magnetic discord-blue button + secondary docs link.
 12. FOOTER: 5 nav, social icons (Discord+GitHub+Twitter inline SVG), legal, ALL-CAPS hacker tagline.

## Global
  - prefers-reduced-motion respected (disables ALL kinetic + replaces WebGL with SVG fallback).
  - Mobile responsive at 1024 / 768 / 480 breakpoints. Bento collapses to single column. Hero h1 scales via clamp.
  - Smooth scroll on anchor links.
  - All interactive elements have visible focus rings (2px outline at --accent, 3px offset).
  - SEO: <meta name='description'>, OG tags (title, description, image), theme-color = --accent.
  - Manifest: name 'EXTEKK', short_name 'EXTEKK', start_url '/', display 'standalone', theme_color = accent, background_color = '#000000'.
  - <link rel='preload'> for critical fonts.
  - Three.js loaded via `import('./three-matrix.js')` — only after first paint, on requestIdleCallback.

No TODO. No placeholder strings. Real working page on first load. The result must read as a $250k Awwwards-tier site — not as 'AI generated'.

## Spec
{{architect}}

## Design
{{designer}}

spec.label: operator
spec.prompt:
OUTPUT MODE: TEXT ONLY. No tools (no write_file, no read_file, no run_shell_command, no sub-agent delegation). Respond with raw text only.

Write README.md and a single deploy snippet. Output as fenced blocks with file-path first-line comments:

  <!-- README.md -->
  Title 'EXTEKK Luxe v3 — Hacker Couture × Glassmorphism × 3D'
  Tagline (≤ 14 words, cyber-elite)
  4 sentences: what-it-is, design fusion (mention style.neon_cyber_minimal ⊕ style.glassmorphism_saas_v2 ⊕ style.aurora_liquid_glass + Framer × Cursor brand fusion + Three.js Matrix rain), 16-point engineer checklist + 3 audit suites, how-it-was-built (ClaudeGravity 4-agent pipeline + LUXE-DESIGN-PLAYBOOK).
  '## Live' section pointing to https://claudegravity.site and https://claudegravity.online
  '## Run locally' section: open index.html in any browser
  Browser support note (Chromium 113+ / Firefox 121+ / Safari 17+, WebGL 2 + variable fonts + backdrop-filter required, JavaScript REQUIRED for full experience, graceful SVG fallback otherwise)
  '## Source provenance' note: re-imagined extekk.mysellauth.com — design + code generated end-to-end through ClaudeGravity v3 pipeline, design language enforced by docs/LUXE-DESIGN-PLAYBOOK.md
  License: MIT one-liner

  <!-- deploy.sh -->
  #!/bin/bash
  Single rsync line uploading to root@46.36.39.161:/var/www/extekk-luxe/, plus `ssh hukot 'systemctl reload caddy'` at the end.

Keep it tight. No prose between blocks.
